title: keeper-vault-sharing.v1 (scaffold)
description: Scaffold-only schema for the keeper-vault-sharing family (P10 in docs/V2_DECISIONS.md). No body yet — landing as part of P10 work. Validators MUST reject any manifest that declares this schema with a non-empty body until x-keeper-live-proof.status leaves 'scaffold-only'.

x-keeper-live-proof.notes: Top-level keys planned: folders, shared_folders, share_records, share_folders. See docs/V2_DECISIONS.md Q1.
